source_description: Close the 'declared but not invoked' gap. #1512 — AgentScheduleEntries::register() declares two recurring tasks (ai:purge-runs daily, ai:reap-stalled-runs every 5min) but has no production caller. #1536 — BroadcastStorage::push() writes to _broadcast_log on every entity save/delete with no scheduled prune (Minoo's local DB had 243 rows from 2026-03 testing). Both are symptoms of the same architectural gap: no auto-discovery path for schedule entries. Introduce ScheduleEntriesInterface and PackageManifestCompiler discovery, mirroring access-policy discovery (cross-references M-B's container-resolved resolver).
